title: Crystal Companion
bio: Glint Pebblewish is a crystal companion who glows brighter when someone feels brave. They feel hopeful, keep dust stars in their facets, and hum softly inside forgotten drawers.

steps.title: Base Shapes
steps.instruction: On the Guides layer, draw a tall diamond shape for the main crystal. Add two smaller crystal shapes beside it like little shoulder stones.
steps.hint: Use straight simple lines, but keep the points slightly soft.

steps.title: Face Placement
steps.instruction: On the Sketch layer, place two small oval eyes in the center of the main crystal. Add gentle raised eyebrows and a tiny smile.
steps.hint: Keep the face small so the crystal still feels tall and shiny.

steps.title: Personality Details
steps.instruction: On the Sketch layer, add simple facet lines, tiny star dust, cheek dots, and a few glow marks around the points.
steps.hint: Facet lines can be short straight lines from the corners toward the middle.

steps.title: Clean Lineart
steps.instruction: On the Lineart layer, trace the crystal outlines, face, facets, stars, cheeks, and glow marks with clean steady lines.
steps.hint: Do not trace every guide line; choose the clearest crystal edges.

steps.title: Color & Details
steps.instruction: On the Color + Details layer, fill the crystals, cheeks, and stars. Add soft shadows near the bottom and pale highlights along one side.
steps.hint: A few light streaks make Glint look magical without adding hard details.
